flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Springfield Technical Community College rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.5k → $6.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Springfield Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Springfield Technical Community College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7k → 4.8k).
